mood: Minimal, pastel, warm and airy. Cream, peach, soft yellow, and deep green. Premium but never cold. Light but never bland.
photography: Bright natural light, real everyday settings — café tables, open-air terraces, sunny windowsills, picnic rugs. Aspirational but accessible. Inclusive groups or solo moments. No gym, no night scenes, no clinical white studio.
typographyDirection: Didot for the wordmark (elegant, confident), Montserrat for labels and body (clear, modern), Brittany Signature for the tagline and script accents (warmth, personality). Avoid heavy sans-serifs or 'action' fonts.
